examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: もっと時間があれば、ここに来られないものだろうか。
examples.translation: If I had more time, wouldn't it be possible to come here?
examples.translationEn: If I had more time, wouldn't it be possible to come here?
examples.romaji: Motto jikan ga areba, koko ni korarenai mono darou ka.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: 彼女にもっとよく説明すれば、理解できないものだろうか。
examples.translation: If I explain it better to her, wouldn't she understand?
examples.translationEn: If I explain it better to her, wouldn't she understand?
examples.romaji: Kanojo ni motto yoku setsumei sureba, rikai dekinai mono darou ka.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: この問題を解決する方法はないものだろうか。
examples.translation: Isn't there a way to solve this problem?
examples.translationEn: Isn't there a way to solve this problem?
examples.romaji: Kono mondai o kaiketsu suru houhou wa nai mono darou ka.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものだろうか
examples.sentence: 自分の間違いを認められないものだろうか。
examples.translation: Can't I admit my own mistakes?
examples.translationEn: Can't I admit my own mistakes?
examples.romaji: Jibun no machigai o mitomerarenai mono darou ka.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 旅行に行きたいと思わないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that I never want to travel.
examples.translationEn: It's not that I never want to travel.
examples.romaji: Ryokou ni ikitai to omowanai mono demo nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 彼の言ったこと全部が間違いないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that everything he said is completely free from mistakes.
examples.translationEn: It's not that everything he said is completely free from mistakes.
examples.romaji: Kare no itta koto zenbu ga machigai nai mono demo nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: その問題が解けないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that the problem can't be solved.
examples.translationEn: It's not that the problem can't be solved.
examples.romaji: Sono mondai ga tokenai mono demo nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ないものでもない
examples.sentence: 彼に会いたくないものでもない。
examples.translation: It's not that I don't want to see him.
examples.translationEn: It's not that I don't want to see him.
examples.romaji: Kare ni aitakunai mono demo nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 笑いのない人生は、つまらない。
examples.translation: A life without laughter is boring.
examples.translationEn: A life without laughter is boring.
examples.romaji: Warai no nai jinsei wa, tsumaranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 水のない場所には、人は住めない。
examples.translation: People cannot live in a place without water.
examples.translationEn: People cannot live in a place without water.
examples.romaji: Mizu no nai basho ni wa, hito wa sumenai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 言葉のない世界は、想像するのが難しい。
examples.translation: It's hard to imagine a world without words.
examples.translationEn: It's hard to imagine a world without words.
examples.romaji: Kotoba no nai sekai wa, souzou suru no ga muzukashii.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb の ない Noun
examples.sentence: 愛のない結婚は、長続きしない。
examples.translation: A marriage without love will not last.
examples.translationEn: A marriage without love will not last.
examples.romaji: Ai no nai kekkon wa, nagatsudzuki shinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: 悪口を言い始めればきりがない。
examples.translation: Once I start speaking ill of someone, there's no end.
examples.translationEn: Once I start speaking ill of someone, there's no end.
examples.romaji: Waruguchi o iihajimereba kiri ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: 彼の欠点を数えればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start counting his flaws, there will be no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start counting his flaws, there will be no end.
examples.romaji: Kare no ketten o kazoereba kiri ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: この国の美しい場所は、挙げればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start listing this country's beautiful places, there's no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start listing this country's beautiful places, there's no end.
examples.romaji: Kono kuni no utsukushii basho wa, agereba kiri ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ば きりがない
examples.sentence: ほかにも例を挙げればきりがない。
examples.translation: If I start giving more examples, there will be no end.
examples.translationEn: If I start giving more examples, there will be no end.
examples.romaji: Hoka ni mo rei o agereba kiri ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 調べもしないで、答えを書きました。
examples.translation: I wrote the answer without even investigating.
examples.translationEn: I wrote the answer without even investigating.
examples.romaji: Shirabe mo shinai de, kotae o kakimashita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 彼は試験を勉強もしないで、テストに合格した。
examples.translation: He passed the test without even studying.
examples.translationEn: He passed the test without even studying.
examples.romaji: Kare wa shiken o benkyou mo shinai de, tesuto ni goukaku shita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 彼女はその本を読みもしないで、レポートを書いた。
examples.translation: She wrote her report without even reading the book.
examples.translationEn: She wrote her report without even reading the book.
examples.romaji: Kanojo wa sono hon o yomi mo shinai de, repooto o kaita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb もしないで
examples.sentence: 準備もしないで、プレゼンテーションを始めました。
examples.translation: He started the presentation without even preparing.
examples.translationEn: He started the presentation without even preparing.
examples.romaji: Junbi mo shinai de, purezenteeshon o hajimemashita.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: こんな時に泣きやしない。
examples.translation: I would never cry at a time like this.
examples.translationEn: I would never cry at a time like this.
examples.romaji: Konna toki ni naki-yashinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 私が彼を助けやしない。
examples.translation: There's no way I'd help him.
examples.translationEn: There's no way I'd help him.
examples.romaji: Watashi ga kare o tasuke-yashinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 彼がそんなことを言いやしない。
examples.translation: He would never say such a thing.
examples.translationEn: He would never say such a thing.
examples.romaji: Kare ga sonna koto o ii-yashinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb やしない
examples.sentence: 私がそんな高価なものを買いやしない。
examples.translation: There's no way I'd buy something so expensive.
examples.translationEn: There's no way I'd buy something so expensive.
examples.romaji: Watashi ga sonna kouka na mono o kai-yashinai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: この問題を解くように努力します。
examples.translation: I will try to solve this problem.
examples.translationEn: I will try to solve this problem.
examples.romaji: Kono mondai o toku you ni doryoku shimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 彼が言ったようにやりましょう。
examples.translation: Let's do it the way he said.
examples.translationEn: Let's do it the way he said.
examples.romaji: Kare ga itta you ni yarimashou.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 毎日走るようにしています。
examples.translation: I make it a point to run every day.
examples.translationEn: I make it a point to run every day.
examples.romaji: Mainichi hashiru you ni shiteimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb よう
examples.sentence: 自分の心を大切にするように。
examples.translation: Try to take care of your own heart.
examples.translationEn: Try to take care of your own heart.
examples.romaji: Jibun no kokoro o taisetsu ni suru you ni.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 彼に話そうか話すまいか、本当に迷っている。
examples.translation: I'm really unsure whether to talk to him or not.
examples.translationEn: I'm really unsure whether to talk to him or not.
examples.romaji: Kare ni hanasou ka hanasu mai ka, hontou ni mayotte iru.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 試験を受けようか受けまいか迷っています。
examples.translation: I'm wondering whether to take the exam or not.
examples.translationEn: I'm wondering whether to take the exam or not.
examples.romaji: Shiken o ukeyou ka ukemai ka mayotte imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: あの人に謝ろうか謝るまいか考えています。
examples.translation: I'm considering whether to apologize to that person or not.
examples.translationEn: I'm considering whether to apologize to that person or not.
examples.romaji: Ano hito ni ayamarou ka ayamaru mai ka kangaete imasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようか Verbるまいか
examples.sentence: 進学しようかしまいか悩んでいる。
examples.translation: I'm worried about whether to continue my studies or not.
examples.translationEn: I'm worried about whether to continue my studies or not.
examples.romaji: Shingaku shiyou ka shimai ka nayande iru.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 彼が来ようが来るまいが、パーティーは始まります。
examples.translation: Whether he comes or not, the party will start.
examples.translationEn: Whether he comes or not, the party will start.
examples.romaji: Kare ga koyou ga kurumai ga, paatii wa hajimarimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 勉強しようがしまいが、テストの結果は変わらない。
examples.translation: Whether you study or not, the test results won't change.
examples.translationEn: Whether you study or not, the test results won't change.
examples.romaji: Benkyou shiyou ga shimai ga, tesuto no kekka wa kawaranai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 雨が降ろうが降るまいが、ピクニックに行きます。
examples.translation: Whether it rains or not, we're going on a picnic.
examples.translationEn: Whether it rains or not, we're going on a picnic.
examples.romaji: Ame ga furou ga furumai ga, pikunikku ni ikimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようが Verb るまいが
examples.sentence: 暑かろうが寒かろうが、毎日ジョギングします。
examples.translation: Whether it's hot or cold, I jog every day.
examples.translationEn: Whether it's hot or cold, I jog every day.
examples.romaji: Atsukarou ga samukarou ga, mainichi jogingu shimasu.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようがない
examples.sentence: 電車が混んでいて、動きようがない。
examples.translation: The train is so crowded that I can't move.
examples.translationEn: The train is so crowded that I can't move.
examples.romaji: Densha ga konde ite, ugoki you ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようがない
examples.sentence: 彼はとても早く走るので、追いつきようがない。
examples.translation: He runs so fast, there's no way I can catch up.
examples.translationEn: He runs so fast, there's no way I can catch up.
examples.romaji: Kare wa totemo hayaku hashiru no de, oitsuki you ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようがない
examples.sentence: 私には理解しようがない。
examples.translation: There's no way for me to understand it.
examples.translationEn: There's no way for me to understand it.
examples.romaji: Watashi ni wa rikai shiyou ga nai.

examples.grammarPoint: Verb ようがない
examples.sentence: どうやっても、これを直しようがない。
examples.translation: No matter what I try, there's no way to fix this.
examples.translationEn: No matter what I try, there's no way to fix this.
examples.romaji: Dou yatte mo, kore o naoshi you ga nai.
